compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add dso:doc-writer to CLAUDE.md named-agent dispatch table
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Add the dso:doc-writer agent entry to the Named-agent dispatch table in CLAUDE.md.

### Implementation
1. Find the Named-agent dispatch table in CLAUDE.md (search for '| Agent | Model | Dispatched by |')
2. Add a new row: | dso:doc-writer | sonnet | /dso:sprint (doc stories), /dso:update-docs |
3. Maintain alphabetical order within the table

### File Impact
- Source: CLAUDE.md (modify — named-agent table only)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md contains dso:doc-writer in the named-agent dispatch table
  Verify: grep -q 'dso:doc-writer' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] Entry includes correct model (sonnet) and dispatching skills
  Verify: grep 'dso:doc-writer' CLAUDE.md | grep -q 'sonnet'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: dso:doc-writer added to CLAUDE.md named-agent dispatch table
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
